description: vedic-astro Parashari Step-0 baseline — natal chart only, asof pinned so the Vimshottari dasha resolves to a fixed running period.

chart_path.description: Same pinned birth chart, entered as a hand-authored pasted chart instead of ephemeris inputs, expanded via lib/chart_io.py --mode parashari and fed to the baseline via --chart. Only the ayanamsa.mode marker and ayanamsa.value_dms differ from the ephemeris-path snapshot (pasted charts don't carry an ayanamsa value) — everything else must match.
